_schema_note: Integration contract. Sessions reflect the public AABW schedule (Day 1 confirmed; Days 2-3 partners confirmed, exact times still being finalised by the organizers and marked indicative). Venue lat/lon are approximate (exact addresses are shared with registrants); travel time is COMPUTED from these coordinates in data.py (haversine x road factor at HCMC average speed), so organizers can refine times just by setting accurate coordinates. Times are local ICT (UTC+7), 24h.

venues.name: Venue TBA
venues.label: Networking nights - address shared on registration

sessions.title: Image & Video AI Networking Night
sessions.description: Invite-only. ~100 practitioners building or backing image and video AI. Requires AABW registration.

sessions.title: Registration & Welcome
sessions.description: Check in, get your badge, and kick off Build Week.

sessions.title: Render the Next Era of Creation with the BytePlus AI Stack
sessions.description: BytePlus (ByteDance's enterprise AI arm) opens the hood on the tools their own teams use to build at scale. Speakers: Vu Tien Hung, Lam Thao, Tran Quoc Huy.

sessions.title: The Full-Stack Advantage: Building Production-Ready AI Agents
sessions.description: Tencent Cloud on building production-ready agents end to end.

sessions.title: Inside the NVIDIA Inception Program: How Startups Build & Scale AI Globally
sessions.description: NVIDIA Inception: compute, capital, and connections for startups. Credits + GPU access + investor network. Speaker: Jason Pham.

sessions.title: TRAE in Your Professional Workflow
sessions.description: A practical look at rewiring how you work with agentic coding tools. Speaker: Rita Huang.

sessions.title: OpenClaw Workshop
sessions.description: Community workshop to close out Day 1.

sessions.title: AWS Workshop
sessions.description: Hands-on with the AWS AI stack at the AWS Office. Meet AWS Solutions Architects (also track judges). Time indicative; Day 2 schedule still being finalised.

sessions.title: Agora Session
sessions.description: Real-time engagement and voice/video AI. Time indicative; Day 2 schedule still being finalised.

sessions.title: TinyFish Session
sessions.description: Web agents at scale. Time indicative; Day 2 schedule still being finalised.

sessions.title: AI x Gaming Networking Night
sessions.description: Invite-only. ~100 people at the intersection of AI and gaming. Requires AABW registration.

sessions.title: Build, Deploy and Monetize AI Agents: The Future of the Developer Economy
sessions.description: Getting an agent deployed, used, and paying you. Time indicative; Day 3 schedule still being finalised.

sessions.title: Beyond Autocomplete: How Agentic AI Solves the Enterprise Design Bottleneck
sessions.description: Plausible pixels vs usable systems, with GDE Linh Nguyen. Time indicative; Day 3 schedule still being finalised.

sessions.title: Antitech Session
sessions.description: Antitech workshop at VNG Campus. Time indicative; Day 3 schedule still being finalised.

sessions.title: Evening Community Night
sessions.description: Community night before Build Day.

sessions.title: Physical AI Networking Night
sessions.description: Invite-only. ~100 people in robotics and embodied AI. Requires AABW registration.

sessions.title: Build Day Keynotes
sessions.description: Keynote speakers incl. Girish Patil (AWS, Applied AI) and Dr. Benedict The (Vietjet, CDO).

sessions.title: Expert Parade + Networking
sessions.description: Meet mentors and enterprise experts across all tracks before you build.

sessions.title: Hackathon Build (heads-down + late-night)
sessions.description: On-site building. This is the hackathon. Submission is due 9:00 AM next morning.

sessions.title: Submission Deadline (Devpost)
sessions.description: Final submission due on Devpost. Late submissions are not accepted.

sessions.title: Demo Day
sessions.description: Teams present, judges score, enterprises evaluate for deployment.

sessions.title: Award Ceremony
sessions.description: Winners announced. Prizes + deployment conversations.

sponsors.name: Amazon Web Services
sponsors.blurb: The world's largest cloud platform and Amazon's profit engine (~$128B revenue, 2025). On the Built with AWS track, judges value AWS-native, production-ready agent architecture.

sponsors.name: Tasco
sponsors.blurb: Vietnamese infrastructure group behind VETC electronic tolling and a growing auto-distribution arm. Listed on HOSE (HUT). Cares about mobility, traffic and tolling data.

sponsors.name: Nova Group
sponsors.blurb: One of Vietnam's largest property developers (NovaWorld, Aqua City). Priorities: property sales, customer experience and smart real estate.

sponsors.name: KFC
sponsors.blurb: Global quick-service restaurant chain (Yum! Brands). Looking for ordering, loyalty, upsell and customer-service automation.

sponsors.name: VNG Games
sponsors.blurb: Publishing arm of VNG, Vietnam's first tech unicorn (owns Zalo and ZaloPay). Interested in AI NPCs, game tooling and player engagement.

sponsors.name: Phong Vu
sponsors.blurb: Major Vietnamese computer and electronics retailer. Priorities: shopping assistants, recommendations and customer support.

sponsors.name: Galaxy Holdings | Vietjet
sponsors.blurb: Vietjet is a major low-cost airline (HOSE: VJC); Galaxy is a media and investment group. Focus: booking, rebooking and customer-service agents.

sponsors.name: Guardian Vietnam
sponsors.blurb: Leading health & beauty retail chain with 130+ stores, owned by DFI Retail Group (Dairy Farm). Wants personalized wellness and product-recommendation assistants.

sponsors.name: GenAI Fund
sponsors.blurb: Southeast Asia's first generative-AI-focused venture fund and the AABW organizer. Runs the Builder Experience track and evaluates winning builds for deployment.

mentors.name: Nguyen Gia Hung
mentors.role: Head of Solutions Architect, VN & Cambodia

perks.name: NVIDIA Inception
perks.claim: Apply at the Day 1 NVIDIA session or nvidia.com/inception

perks.name: AWS Activate
perks.claim: Ask an AWS SA at the Day 2 AWS Office for a provider referral

perks.name: Partner credit drop
perks.value: API credits from OpenAI, Qwen, Notion, BytePlus and others
perks.claim: Claim from July 1 via Discord and aabw.genaifund.ai

key_dates.label: Builder onboarding webinar (tracks + judging criteria preview)
Confirm your track on Devpost by 9:00 PM ICT (60 slots/track)
